comment: 19 Jul 2026 reassessment flight. Run A verdict: label head costs ~2x cleanup dE at 1.9M params, flatten buys 5-9% at the engine. Two suspects for the tax: (1) CE loss pressure too high, (2) capacity contention. One probe each. The 2x recipe was cleared by labels-sanity-2x (epoch-39 val 0.0093 vs Run A's 0.0094).
